address.description: Contact information for a page or article element

area.description: Hyperlink or dead area on an image map

base.description: Base URL and default target navigable for hyperlinks and forms

blockquote.description: A section quoted from another source

br.description: Line break, e.g. in poem or postal address

colgroup.description: Group of columns in a table

datalist.description: Container for options for combo box control

div.description: Generic flow container, or container for name-value groups in dl elements

dl.description: Association list consisting of zero or more name-value groups

footer.description: Footer for a page or section

header.description: Introductory or navigational aids for a page or section

main.description: Container for the dominant contents of the document

optgroup.description: Group of options in a list box

option.description: Option in a list box or combo box control

source.description: Image source for img or media source for video or audio

tbody.description: Group of rows in a table

tfoot.description: Group of footer rows in a table

thead.description: Group of heading rows in a table

time.description: Machine-readable equivalent of date- or time-related data
